compiled_state.title: Write RED structural marker tests for Phase 2 confidence routing (d875-4466)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
Per Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5, instruction files (SKILL.md) are tested via structural markers. Add 5 structural marker tests to tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh asserting Phase 2 confidence routing markers exist in SKILL.md. Tests run RED until T2 adds the routing logic.

## What to Build
Add to tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh:

1. test_phase2_confidence_routing_table_present: SKILL.md Phase 2 must contain a confidence routing table with all 3 routing tiers (high=skip, medium=confirm, low=ask)
2. test_phase2_high_confidence_skip_summary_present: SKILL.md Phase 2 must contain skip summary text like "Detected" + "skipping" in area sections
3. test_phase2_medium_confidence_prefill_confirm_present: SKILL.md Phase 2 must contain "Does this look right?" confirm template
4. test_phase2_nontechnical_path_present: SKILL.md Phase 2 must contain a non-technical path section with engineering-specific question handling
5. test_phase2_all_seven_dimensions_routed: SKILL.md Phase 2 must reference all 7 dimensions in confidence routing context

Use awk to scope patterns to the Phase 2 section.

## TDD Requirement
Tests must FAIL (RED) immediately after writing. Run: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh

## Test Approach
Given: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
When: awk/grep applied to Phase 2 section
Then: patterns found/not found determines pass/fail

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh contains all 5 new test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_phase2_confidence_routing_table_present\|test_phase2_high_confidence_skip_summary_present\|test_phase2_medium_confidence_prefill_confirm_present\|test_phase2_nontechnical_path_present\|test_phase2_all_seven_dimensions_routed' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] New tests fail before T2 (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'
- [ ] RED marker [test_phase2_confidence_routing_table_present] added to .test-index
  Verify: grep '\[test_phase2_confidence_routing_table_present\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] All previously passing tests continue to pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -v 'test_phase2_' | grep -v FAIL
